utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding fields by name. Now check if each is fully specified with required details (coverage + costs). 1) health_coverage: specifies plan name, policy number, €110/month cost, and describes coverage scope; meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. 2) property_coverage: specifies plan name, policy number, €60/month cost, and says 'photography equipment coverage'; however the required item is 'home/contents insurance with costs'. This is not the same; thus not fully specified according to the required format. 3) travel_coverage: includes plan name and €20/month cost and timing; fulfills 'travel insurance with costs'. 4) additional_services: provides a professional liability plan with €60/month cost; matches 'any enhancement services with costs'. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown; includes optional travel add-on and start dates; fulfills requirement.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact option names in the ground-truth ratings. The items present are: HealthFirst Standard Plan (health_coverage), VitalPlus Standard Coverage (property_coverage), CareCo Basic Plan (travel_coverage), and InsurePlus Standard Professional Liability Coverage (additional_services). Ground-truth has ratings for HealthFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health (rating 7), VitalPlus Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content (rating 7), and CareCo Basic Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (rating 4). There is no entry for 'InsurePlus Standard Professional Liability Coverage' in the ground-truth ratings, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted from RATINGS as per instructions to map only items with given ratings.
